attackDescription: Employees in the HR department received emails impersonating the payroll system, asking them to 'verify' login credentials via a fake portal.
howItHappened: Attacker spoofed the internal payroll sender address and used a lookalike domain to host a credential-harvesting page.
impact: 3 employee accounts compromised; attacker briefly accessed payroll records before detection.
mitigationSteps: Reset affected passwords, enabled MFA org-wide, blocked the malicious domain at the firewall, ran a phishing-awareness refresher.

attackDescription: A ransomware variant encrypted files on the shared department file server overnight.
howItHappened: Initial access via an unpatched RDP endpoint exposed to the internet; attacker moved laterally and deployed the payload after hours.
impact: 48 hours of downtime for the finance department; no ransom paid, restored from backups.
mitigationSteps: Closed exposed RDP port, enforced VPN-only remote access, patched the vulnerable service, improved backup isolation.

attackTitle: SQL injection on customer login form
attackDescription: Automated scanning tool found and exploited an SQL injection vulnerability in the customer login form.
howItHappened: Login form concatenated user input directly into a SQL query without parameterization.
impact: Attacker was able to enumerate a small number of usernames before the WAF blocked further attempts.
mitigationSteps: Rewrote query layer to use parameterized queries/ORM, added WAF rule, ran full code audit for similar patterns.

attackTitle: DDoS attack on public API gateway
attackDescription: A volumetric DDoS attack overwhelmed the public API gateway with traffic spikes reaching 40 Gbps.
howItHappened: Botnet-driven UDP flood targeting the load balancer's public IP.
impact: API availability degraded for 90 minutes; some downstream partner integrations timed out.
mitigationSteps: Enabled upstream DDoS scrubbing service, added rate limiting, updated incident response runbook.
